zh.Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Marjorie Comyn於1256年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵時，她的父親Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland39歲，母親Elizabeth de Quincy36歲。她於大約1270年與Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1296年4月29日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Marjorie Comyn于1256年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland39岁，母亲Elizabeth de Quincy36岁。她于大约1270年与Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1296年4月29日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Marjorie Comyn was born in 1256, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth de Quincy, was 36. She married Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar about 1270. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 29 April 1296, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Marjorie Comyn est née en 1256, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Quincy, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar environ 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 avril 1296, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Marjorie Comyn 1256 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland 39 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Quincy 36. Sie hat um 1270 Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. April 1296 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marjorie Comyn è nata il nel 1256 nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Quincy, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar circa 1270. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 aprile 1296, nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Marjorie Comynが1256年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotlandは39歳，母Elizabeth de Quincyは36歳であった。約1270年にPatrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1296年4月29日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Marjorie Comyn(이)가 1256년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Quincy(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1270년 Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1296년 4월 29일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marjorie Comyn nasceu em 1256, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Quincy, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar aproximadamente 1270. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de abril de 1296, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Marjorie Comyn родилась в 1256 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Quincy, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar около 1270 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 29 апреля 1296 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Marjorie Comyn nació en 1256, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Quincy, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Patrick IV 8th Earl of Dunbar aproximadamente 1270. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de abril de 1296, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 40 años.
